name: Zoom Accounts Never Used (90 days)
description: Detects active Zoom accounts older than 90 days that have never logged in.
query: SELECT u.id AS id, u.first_name AS account_name, u.created_at AS created_at FROM zoom_users u WHERE LOWER(COALESCE(u.status, '')) IN ('active','enabled','provisioned','onboarded') AND u.last_login_time IS NULL AND u.created_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'
remediation: Remove or disable never-used accounts and fix any over-provisioning in onboarding workflows.
